title: AGNI Spaced-Repetition Review Schedule
description: Per-student, per-lesson spaced-repetition state (SM-2 algorithm parameters). Drives adaptive review timing for each student–lesson pair.

students.description: Map of student pseudo-ID to their lesson review states.

additionalProperties.description: Map of lesson ID to spaced-repetition parameters.

easeFactor.description: SM-2 ease factor (≥ 1.3). Higher values mean longer intervals.

lastReviewAt.description: Unix timestamp (ms) of the most recent review.

nextReviewAt.description: Unix timestamp (ms) when the next review is due.

quality.description: SM-2 quality score from the last review (0–5).
